title: Charred Watermelon, Feta & Mint Salad

ingredients.note: rind kept on, sliced into 3-4cm wedges

instructions: Combine 3 tbsp of the oil and the vinegar in a non-metallic bowl. Season. Stir in the shallots and set aside to pickle lightly. Will keep chilled for a few hours.

Heat a griddle pan over a high heat. Brush the rest of the oil all over the melon wedges and, once the pan is very hot, cook for 1-2 mins on each side until charred and juicy. Remove the rinds and slice the wedges into neat triangles, then arrange on a serving platter. Crumble over the feta and top with the mint, pickled shallots, any melon juices from the pan, the sesame seeds and peanuts.
notes: Nutrition (per serving, based on 6 servings): 346 kcals | Fat: 23g (Saturates: 7g) | Carbs: 23g (Sugars: 20g) | Fibre: 2g
Good to know: vit c, 2 of 5-a-day. Easy, Vegetarian (V).
